cookies.banner: This site uses only technical cookies necessary for its proper operation. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.

policy.title: Cookie Policy
policy.intro: Information about the use of cookies on the Mashini & Associés website.

whatAre.title: What is a cookie?
whatAre.desc: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet or phone) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember certain information about your browsing.

technical.title: Technical cookies
technical.desc: Our site uses only technical cookies, which are essential for the site to function. They do not collect any data for advertising or profiling purposes.

locale.title: Language cookie
locale.desc: A cookie is used to remember the language you have selected (French, English or Chinese) so that the content is displayed in your language on future visits.

noTracking.title: No advertising cookies
noTracking.desc: We do not use any tracking, behavioural analytics or advertising cookies. No browsing data is shared with third parties.

manage.title: Managing cookies
manage.desc: You can disable cookies at any time via your browser settings. Please note that disabling technical cookies may affect the proper functioning of the site.
browsers: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies
Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: For any questions about our use of cookies, contact us at contact@mashiniassocies.com.

common.messageError: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly by email.
common.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

footer.description: Audit, accountancy and financial advisory firm supporting businesses and international subsidiaries in Central Africa.

hero.title:
Making Exception
that rewrites
hero.description: Premium audit, accountancy and financial advisory firm, specialising in supporting international subsidiaries and market-leading businesses in Central Africa.
hero.stat1Desc: Deep knowledge of Congolese regulatory and economic realities

services.title: Solutions tailored to every financial challenge
services.description: From statutory audit to strategic advisory, our services cover all financial, tax, and operational needs of organisations.

sectors.title: In-depth knowledge of your industry
sectors.description: Every sector has its specificities. Our teams develop sharp sector expertise to deliver solutions matched to your operational realities.

blog.title: Financial news decoded
blog.description: Our experts share their analysis on the accounting, tax and strategic issues impacting businesses in Central Africa.

dualExpertise.title: Our dual expertise
growthDeskItems: View your dashboards and financial KPIs
Access your financial statements and management reports
Track your tax and social obligations
Review tax events and their regulatory references
Respond to document requests from the firm
Collaborate directly with our teams in a secure workspace

cta.title: Is your business investment-ready?
cta.description: Request a personalised and confidential assessment.

sectors.title:
Industry
sectors
sectors.description: Sector expertise at the service of your performance
sectors.intro1: Every sector has its own financial, tax, regulatory and operational challenges.
sectors.intro2: At Mashini & Associés, we develop solutions adapted to the realities of each industry to help businesses strengthen their governance, improve performance and meet the requirements of investors, financial partners and regulatory authorities.
sectors.notListedDesc: Our teams operate across many other sectors. Contact us to discuss your specific situation.

blog.title: Analysis and insights for decision-makers
blog.description: Accounting, taxation, IFRS standards, business management — our experts share their analyses on issues that matter to businesses in the DRC.
blog.ctaDesc: Our experts are available to analyse your context and propose concrete solutions.

services.title: Our services
services.description: Tailored solutions to address the accounting, financial, tax and strategic challenges of your organisation.
services.sidebarCtaDesc: Speak with our experts to assess your needs and receive a proposal tailored to your organisation.

cabinet.title:
About
Mashini & Associés
cabinet.description: An independent, rigorous and committed firm dedicated to financial performance and governance of organisations in Central Africa.
cabinet.historyTitle: Expertise built to serve international groups
cabinet.historyText: Mashini & Associés was founded with the ambition of providing subsidiaries of international groups established in Central Africa with a single, rigorous and independent interlocutor, capable of meeting the requirements of international standards while mastering local regulatory specificities.
cabinet.visionTitle: To become the reference for financial intelligence in Central Africa
cabinet.visionText: We want to be the trusted partner of international groups and investors who believe in the sub-region, combining audit rigour with on-the-ground economic intelligence.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: International standards in service of performance.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: A rigorous, independent and transparent approach.

values.title: Impact
values.description: We turn financial data into strategic decisions.

values.title: Local vision
values.description: A deep understanding of African markets.

cabinet.refsText: We support local subsidiaries of international groups active in energy, telecommunications, agro-industry, logistics and financial services. Details of our references are provided on request, in accordance with client confidentiality.
cabinet.ctaTitle: Let's discuss the challenges facing your subsidiary

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: A question, a project or a specific need? Our team is here to listen and will respond within 48 hours.
contact.profilesEntreprisesIntro: You run a local business and would like to discuss your accounting, tax or financing needs.
contact.profilesFilialesIntro: You represent the subsidiary of an international group and are looking for a local audit and reporting partner.
contact.profilesInvestisseursIntro: You are exploring investment opportunities in Central Africa and wish to benefit from our economic intelligence.
contact.profilesPartenairesIntro: You represent an institution, firm or professional network seeking to establish a partnership.
contact.successDesc: We have received your message and will respond within 48 hours.
contact.errorMsg: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly by email.

secteurs.title:
Industry
sectors
secteurs.description: Sector expertise in service of your performance
secteurs.introText1: Each industry sector presents its own financial, tax, regulatory and operational challenges.
secteurs.introText2: At Mashini & Associés, we develop solutions tailored to each industry's realities, helping businesses strengthen their governance, improve their performance and meet the expectations of investors, financial partners and regulatory authorities.
secteurs.ctaSubtitle: Our teams work across many other sectors. Contact us to discuss your specific situation.
secteurs.sidebarDesc: Our sector experts are available to analyse your situation and propose a tailored approach.
secteurs.whyDesc: We understand your sector's operational realities. Our approach combines technical expertise and strategic vision to create lasting value.
secteurs.expertsDesc: Let's discuss your financial, tax or regulatory challenges.
secteurs.ctaFinal: Take your company's finance function to the next level
secteurs.ctaFinalSub: Our experts are available to discuss your challenges.
secteurs.refDesc: Our teams operate in compliance with the main applicable frameworks:

talents.title: Build your future with MASHINI & Associés
talents.description: Join a team that builds exception. We believe the best professionals are shaped by curiosity, integrity and the will to learn.
talents.visionTitle:
We spot potential.
We develop excellence.
talents.visionText1: We firmly believe that technical skills can be acquired. Integrity, intellectual curiosity, discipline and commitment are the true foundations of a lasting career.
talents.visionText2: That is why we place as much importance on human qualities as on technical skills. Every team member benefits from progressive mentoring, daily guidance and exposure to diverse assignments.
talents.visionText3: Our goal is simple: to train today the experts who will support the businesses of tomorrow.

pillars.title: Potential
pillars.desc: We identify people capable of learning quickly and improving continuously.

pillars.title: Excellence
pillars.desc: We apply high standards to every engagement.

pillars.title: Knowledge sharing
pillars.desc: We believe knowledge is shared and built every day within our teams.

pillars.title: Responsibility
pillars.desc: We progressively develop each person's autonomy and accountability.

steps.title: Selection
steps.desc: We look above all for potential, motivation and human qualities.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.desc: Each new team member discovers our methods, culture and quality standards.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Through assignments, coaching and feedback, everyone progressively builds their skills.

steps.title: Empowerment
steps.desc: Autonomy and responsibilities grow in line with acquired competencies.

steps.title: Excellence
steps.desc: Our team members become professionals capable of supporting demanding organisations in complex environments.

talents.skillsIntro: At MASHINI & Associés, you will strengthen your skills across several areas:
talents.cultureTitle: A culture built on strong values

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Doing what is right, in all circumstances.

values.title: Curiosity
values.desc: Learning continuously and questioning established practices.

values.title: Accountability
values.desc: Fully assuming our commitments to our clients and colleagues.

values.title: Value creation
values.desc: Producing concrete and lasting impact for the organisations we support.

talents.engagementText1: We believe that collective success rests on investing in people. We create an environment where everyone can learn, grow and develop the skills needed to meet the challenges of modern business.
talents.engagementText2: Our ambition is to build a team recognised for its professionalism, integrity and ability to create lasting value for our clients.
talents.joinText1: We are looking for people who want to grow in a demanding environment, learn continuously and contribute to high-value projects.
talents.joinText2: If you share our vision of excellence and wish to take part in building a reference firm in Central Africa, we will be delighted to consider your application.
talents.opportunitiesDesc: Discover available positions and join a team building excellence in Central Africa.
talents.noPositionsDesc: We are not actively recruiting at the moment — but your profile may still interest us.
talents.noPositionsDesc2: Send us a spontaneous application and we will get back to you as soon as an opportunity matching your profile arises.
talents.applicationDesc: Share your profile and motivation — we review every application with care.
talents.why2: Exposure to varied and demanding engagements
talents.why4: A culture built on integrity and excellence
talents.why5: A stimulating working environment in Central Africa
talents.formDesc: Complete the form below. Fields marked * are required.
talents.placeholderExperience: E.g. Bachelor's in accountancy, 2 years' audit experience…
talents.placeholderMotivation: Introduce yourself, explain your interest in MASHINI & Associés and what you wish to bring to the team…
talents.successDesc: We have received your application and will get back to you as soon as possible.
talents.errorMsg: An error occurred. Please try again.

growthDesk.heroDesc: Your firm MASHINI & Associés provides you with a Growth Desk report: SYSCOHADA financial statements, tax monitoring, administrative compliance — all in an interactive document you open in your browser.
growthDesk.tabsTitle: 8 interactive tabs in a single file
growthDesk.tabsDesc: Your report opens directly in your browser, with no installation. Printable to PDF in one click.

tabs.title: Overview
tabs.desc: Your 4 key KPIs, cost structure, top 5 clients

tabs.title: SYSCOHADA Balance Sheet
tabs.desc: Full assets/liabilities with N/N-1 comparison and drill-down

tabs.title: Income Statement
tabs.desc: Added value, EBITDA, EBIT, net income — full SYSCOHADA cascade

tabs.title: Cash Flow
tabs.desc: Working capital, WCR, net cash, cash flow

tabs.title: Financial Ratios
tabs.desc: 12 ratios with visual gauges and alert thresholds

tabs.title: Aged Balances
tabs.desc: BACD, BACC, BAFC, BAFD with GL reconciliation

growthDesk.drillDesc: Each line of the balance sheet opens to show the accounts that make it up. Click on an account to see all its accounting entries.
growthDesk.drillStep1: Click on an aggregated line — e.g. Clients 153,663
growthDesk.drillStep3: Click on an account to see its individual General Ledger entries
growthDesk.fiscalTitle: Your full tax situation at a glance
growthDesk.fiscalDesc: Tax returns, tax assessments with all phases, reminders and obligations — with status and SharePoint documents.

fiscalCards.title: Tax returns
fiscalCards.desc: VAT, CIT, PIT, CNSS, INPP, ONEM — all your returns with due date and status

fiscalCards.title: Tax audit files
fiscalCards.desc: Notice of observation, reassessment notice, AMR, payment notice — each phase with payments and disputes

fiscalCards.title: Reminders & proceedings
fiscalCards.desc: Formal notice, seizure — with response deadlines and document links

growthDesk.conformDesc: Your firm monitors all your legal and administrative obligations. Your report shows your real-time compliance score with supporting evidence.
growthDesk.ratiosDesc: Compare your performance against SYSCOHADA benchmarks. Every ratio comes with a visual gauge and a clear interpretation.
growthDesk.exportDesc: Your Growth Desk report is a standalone HTML file. No application to install, no internet connection required.

exportPoints.title: No installation needed
exportPoints.desc: Double-click to open in Chrome, Edge or Firefox

exportPoints.title: Printable in one click
exportPoints.desc: Integrated Print/PDF button for archiving or presentation

exportPoints.title: Confidential data protected
exportPoints.desc: Your report does not pass through any server — everything stays local

exportPoints.title: N/N-1 comparison
exportPoints.desc: Your current figures vs the previous period side by side in all statements

growthDesk.ctaDesc: Contact your MASHINI & Associés firm to receive your Growth Desk report — full SYSCOHADA financial statements, tax monitoring and compliance score.
growthDesk.ctaFooter: Growth Desk is an in-house reporting tool developed by Cabinet MASHINI & Associés.

investmentScore.title:
Mashini
Investment Score
investmentScore.description: Our proprietary methodology for assessing the financial solidity, governance and investment potential of businesses will be available in 2027.
investmentScore.howDesc: The Mashini Investment Score assesses a company's investability on 100 points across 10 essential pillars. A comprehensive, shareable report produced by our teams.

steps.title: Assess
steps.desc: Structured diagnostic across 10 financial, operational and governance pillars.

steps.title: Structure
steps.desc: Prioritised recommendations to address weaknesses and strengthen your dossier.

steps.title: Finance
steps.desc: An objective score and a shareable report for your banking and investor partners.

investmentScore.scoreNote: Illustrative score — each company receives an individual score based on its own data.

pillars.title: Governance & Structure
pillars.desc: Quality of governing bodies, legal documentation, shareholding structure.

pillars.title: Financial performance
pillars.desc: Profitability, solvency, liquidity, evolution over 3 SYSCOHADA fiscal years.

pillars.title: Compliance & Taxation
pillars.desc: Administrative compliance score, tax and social regularity.

pillars.title: Growth potential
pillars.desc: Market position, commercial pipeline, capacity to absorb financing.

investmentScore.ctaDesc: Contact us to register your company and receive your score at launch.

economicIntelligence.title:
Economic
Intelligence
economicIntelligence.description: Our editorial section dedicated to economic, financial and sector analysis of Central Africa will launch in 2027. Register to receive our first publications.
economicIntelligence.comingDesc: Our analysts are preparing a reference editorial publication on the Central African economy, aimed at CFOs, investors and decision-makers.

previews.title: Mashini Economic Brief
previews.desc: Quarterly macroeconomic analysis of the CEMAC zone and DRC — indicators, trends, risks.

previews.title: Sector Analysis
previews.desc: In-depth sector analysis: mining, telecom, agri-food, infrastructure, financial services.

previews.title: Investment Insights
previews.desc: Investment opportunities identified by our analysts, with country-risk assessment.

previews.title: Company Intelligence
previews.desc: Profiling and financial analysis of key players in Central Africa's economy.

economicIntelligence.ctaTitle: Be among the first to know
economicIntelligence.ctaDesc: Contact us to receive our first publications at the 2027 launch.
economicIntelligence.noPublications: No publications in this category yet.
economicIntelligence.sidebarDesc: A question about this analysis or your exposure to this topic? Contact our Economic Intelligence team.
